---
title: "QIAP — Projects"
---

[← Back to portal](/index.html)


The project work for **QIAP** lives in its own repository.

[<i class="bi bi-github"></i>&nbsp; Open the QIAP projects on GitHub](https://github.com/PhyAMR/QIAP-projects){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-lg role="button"}

<https://github.com/PhyAMR/QIAP-projects>

*(No project README was found under this course's `projects/` directory. Add a `README.md` there and re-run `Notes/generate_listing.py`.)*
